plugins.name: Cross-Volume Write Fix (0.1.2)
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Fixes a Paralives 0.1.2 regression that breaks Workshop mod loading (and some save writes) when your Steam library is on a different drive than Windows %TEMP%. The devs' new atomic-write helper uses Path.GetTempFileName() (under %TEMP%) + File.Replace, which throws Win32 error 1176 (ERROR_UNABLE_TO_MOVE_REPLACEMENT) cross-volume. This patch routes the temp file to the same directory as the destination so File.Replace works. Install if you see 'IOException: Win32 IO returned 1176' in your BepInEx log, or if Workshop mods stopped loading after 0.1.2.

plugins.name: Plugin Hub
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Browse, install, and toggle Paralives mods from inside the game. Auto-updates itself and your installed mods on each launch — no manual file copying after the first install. Also fixes the Steam-offline boot hang so the game launches without internet. v1.0.17: 25 bug fixes — atomic DLL writes, uninstall/auto-update loop fixes, manifest parser improvements, listener leak fix, and more.

plugins.name: Not Enough Workshop Mods
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Fixes the Steam Workshop 50-mod cap. Without it, any subscribed mods past #50 get DELETED from your computer on game launch. v1.1.0 is a full rewrite for reliability: every Steam page query is time-bounded so a cold/unready Steam can never hang the loading screen; the game NEVER deletes local mods on an incomplete, failed, or empty subscription list (only on a complete, authoritative one); each mod is loaded in isolation so one bad mod can't abort the rest; and mod downloads are deferred off the boot loading screen to prevent cold-boot freezes. Mods that fail to load are shown in My Mods with a red (Skipped) / amber (Partial) tag instead of vanishing silently. Cross-platform (Windows/Mac/Linux/Steam Deck).

plugins.name: Stop Reimporting My Mods
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Stops broken or outdated mods from freezing the loading screen, softlocking a save, or making your other mods silently fail to show up. When a mod fails — a broken/missing package, an asset that throws or hangs during reimport, or a corrupt placed item in a save — it's skipped for that session and named in the log, then tried again next launch (so a one-off failure never locks a mod out). v1.0.7 adds a save-load guard that identifies the exact Workshop item softlocking a save, a fix for a recurring boot-time crash, and full stack-trace logging. Includes the per-asset guard, the package-load guard, and the async reimport watchdog as a final safety net.

plugins.name: Menu FPS Limiter
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Stops your fans screaming while the menu sits at 200+ fps doing nothing. Caps menu to 60fps, drops to 10fps when alt-tabbed, 3fps when minimized. Gameplay runs uncapped. All thresholds configurable.

plugins.name: Stats Overlay
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Unity-Editor-style stats panel — FPS, CPU/render times, draw calls, triangles, audio level, animation counts. Top-left overlay. Press F3 to toggle.
